title: Mustardy Egyptian Coconut Cream Tagine
description: A flavorful and satisfying weeknight dish featuring beurre-noisette and coconut cream. Perfect for a low-glycemic dinner.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
In a small bowl, whisk together beurre noisette, brown mustard, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the whisked mixture to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Pour in the chilled coconut cream and stir to combine with the onion mixture.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Stir in the plain Greek yogurt and lemon juice. Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve the tagine over rice or with naan bread.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
